notes.killed_definition: Killed means not used in future model-building sweeps, while remaining preserved in artifacts for history and reference.
notes.semantic_coarse_caution: semantic_coarse remains the best validation family, but it also retrieves the largest average word volume among the promoted semantic set and should be treated as a high-context candidate rather than the only default.
notes.semantic_balanced_default: semantic_balanced is the safest lightweight semantic default because it remains near the top overall, wins corrected nonlocal subset rankings, and is more context-efficient than semantic_coarse.
